title: mabrya geniculata subsp. lanata
intro: Mabrya geniculata subsp. lanata, also known as hairy Mabrya or woolly Mabrya, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Mabrya geniculata subsp. lanata include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and possibly alleviate symptoms of certain conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. In herbal preparations, Mabrya geniculata subsp. lanata is often used as a tea or tincture, and it may also be incorporated into topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
